name: Falcon.io
description:
Falcon.io gives you a bird’s eye view of your social media presence. From collaborative abilities to advanced social listening and customer research capabilities, Falcon lets you conquer social from the skies! You can build winning content, engage with consumers, and smash your goals. And that’s all on top of the advanced scheduling and publishing tools.

Ready to take to the skies? Here’s a breakdown of Falcon’s top features:

  • Falcon runs you $108/month
  • Monitor your brand mentions with great social listening capabilities. Keep a finger on the pulse of your public opinion without adding to your workload
  • Anticipate consumer demand with deep research, letting you see what customers are talking about
  • Create winning content with streamlined publishing tools. Get ready to manage and execute your data-driven strategy with ease!
  • Engage with consumers directly from the platform!
  • Enjoy posting across Facebook, Youtube, Instagram, Tiktok, Twitter, LinkedIn, Reddit, Tumblr, and more

Key features:

  • ✅ Social listening
  • ✅ Trend discovery
  • ✅ Customer engagement + social inbox
  • ✅ Advanced analytics + reporting
what_people_say:
What people say :

Falcon does it all! While it’s not the choice for agencies, Falcon more than delivers for SMBs and enterprises alike. From social listening and engagement directly on the platform to advanced research and analytics, Falcon gives you 20/20 vision on your social presence.

Here’s what customers have to say:

“With Falcon, we can engage with notable people and track trends, share it with our team, nurture those relationships, and convert them into loyal customers of our brand.”

“Falcon is great for analytics. We can do performance reports with one click, whereas it used to take 5 hours to generate one report. Now, we spend around 10 minutes on reporting.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 AI integration
  • 🚫 Multi-brand management
